steps.title: Compare the timelines
steps.content: Text 1 presents Wright's view that Neolithic pastoralism helped cause the Sahara's desertification. Text 2 says Brierley's team revised the timeline, concluding that the humid period ended 500 years earlier than previously assumed.

steps.title: Apply Brierley's response
steps.content: Choice B says pastoralism may have contributed, which Text 2 challenges. Choice C overstates a mixed-effects view. Choice D calls for more research instead of giving Brierley's likely response. The revised timing supports saying Neolithic subsistence likely did not cause the desertification. The answer is A.
